proofStatement: The claimant knows oracle-signed event data bound to the policy; the hidden event satisfies the public threshold; the nullifier is derived from the same event and has not been consumed.
fieldEncoding: Each public input is encoded as a 32-byte big-endian BN254 field element and concatenated in the listed order before Soroban verifier submission.

domainSeparator.name: verifier_domain
domainSeparator.purpose: Binds the proof to the LumenSure claim-verifier domain used by the contract and judge evidence fixture.

publicInputs.name: event_commitment
publicInputs.constraint: Poseidon(policy_id, private event value, private timestamp, private nonce)

publicInputs.name: policy_id
publicInputs.constraint: Bound into event commitment and nullifier derivations

publicInputs.name: nullifier
publicInputs.constraint: Poseidon(policy_id, private timestamp, private nonce); also checked against consumed nullifier storage

publicInputs.name: oracle_public_key_x
publicInputs.constraint: BabyJubJub EdDSA public key X for signature verification

publicInputs.name: oracle_public_key_y
publicInputs.constraint: BabyJubJub EdDSA public key Y for signature verification

publicInputs.name: payout_recipient
publicInputs.constraint: Bound by the circuit fixture to the judge payout recipient field

publicInputs.name: verifier_domain
publicInputs.constraint: Bound by the circuit fixture to the LumenSure verifier domain

publicInputs.name: marker_fields
publicInputs.constraint: Fixed marker values 8 through 17 prevent field-order drift
